_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source presets for legal-peripherals-mcp (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Syncs Secretary-of-State business-entity records (via the OpenCorporates-backed sos lookup) into the KG as :BusinessEntity documents through the legal-peripherals-mcp MCP server. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS.
